value.description: Hooks let you inject custom scripts into the Codex agentic loop at named lifecycle events such as `PreToolUse`, `PostToolUse`, `SessionStart`, `Stop`, and others. You define them in `hooks.json` or `config.toml` at user or project level, specify a matcher and a command handler, and Codex runs matching hooks concurrently at each event; non-managed hooks must be reviewed and trusted via `/hooks` before they execute.
value.label: Hooks
